body:
Let’s remind Hillary and the MSM that Donald Trump has the best supporters! |

Friend, The final presidential debate of 2016 is 2 days away, and our campaign is more excited than ever. Despite the media’s best efforts to put down my father – even stacking the last debate with two clearly biased moderators – he showed that he will not be intimidated by the Clinton machine. Donald Trump is going to fight for YOU in Washington, just like he fought for the TRUTH on the debate stage last week. The Washington establishment and the mainstream media may be with Crooked Hillary... ...But if there is one thing America now knows about my dad it’s this: he’s fighting the rigged system to give power back to the American citizens. Let’s show him that we have his back. Our campaign has set the goal of raising $500,000 before the debate -- – we want my dad to be able to tell the media and Hillary Clinton that despite their best efforts to smear him, supporters like YOU are behind him 100%. Friend, please make an urgent contribution of $25, $50, $75, $100 or even $250 right away. HELP US REACH OUR GOAL My dad has a lot to be proud of – a multimillion-dollar business, one of the most successful brands in the country, receiving more votes than any other Republican candidate in history – but what he is proudest of are people like YOU, his loyal supporters. We want to give my dad something to brag about when he’s on the debate stage for the final time – that’s why we have set the goal of raising $500,000 from everyday Americans like YOU before he steps on stage Wednesday night. Ensure we hit our goal by making a generous contribution on our secure website, http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/ecibaT27BADEFaBS9OoaGIYbDRMN6aaaaGIYbBMAJVKoa?m=-@u8xByF&W=lh4atdqkCz_oeiat.Uwe&t=U&5= Remember, this campaign runs on the support of people like YOU. Your donation today will go directly toward our critical Get-Out-the-Vote effort, and to fund the ads that tell the TRUTH about my father and what he stands for. Sincerely, Eric Trump PS: It is no question there is an enthusiasm gap in this campaign – Hillary Clinton offers nothing but the same failed policies that Washington has been peddling for decades. My dad is going to make big changes, fix Washington and Make America Great Again. Help us crush our $500,000 goal before the final debate on Wednesday night with a contribution of $25, $50, $75, $100 or even $250. Thank you! HELP US REACH OUR GOAL

Friend,

Did you see who was in Florida this week campaigning for Hillary Clinton and the Democrat ticket?

**AL GORE**
So let's add Al to the list of liberal Democrats who are trying to sway Florida voters:

**Hillary Clinton
Barack Obama
Al Gore
Elizabeth Warren
Bernie Sanders
Barney Frank
** **_And the list goes on and on..._**
**Friend, they are all so interested in Florida, because they know the balance of the Senate majority comes down to what happens here in Florida on November 8th.**

In addition to these campaign stops across Florida, the national Democrats are pouring millions and millions across our state to slander my name and campaign.

subject: My update for you

body:
It has been a big month for Team Russ. I wanted to make sure you got my personal update. | [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf460c/1c469400/442c29/3540767/1974950469/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-cob?utm_source=ema_2016-10-17_RDF1_ND&refcode=ema_2016-10-17_RDF1_ND&utm_campaign=COB&utm_medium=ema") Friend, October has been a big month for Team Russ: We've hosted roundtables and rallies to listen to seniors' concerns about cuts to Social Security and Medicare. I've heard from students, who say their biggest concern after graduating is being crushed by student loan debt. My friends Senators Bernie Sanders, Elizabeth Warren, and Al Franken joined me on the campaign trail to speak with voters about why we're working so hard: To make sure the voices of middle-class and working families are represented in the Senate, and to fight for our shared progressive values. We've seen polls that have us up, polls that have us within the margin of error, and even polls that show us down. **But no matter what the polls say, we haven't lost focus.** While I've been on the road meeting with folks across the state, our campaign team has been working around the clock. We're up on the air with TV ads. We're in the field meeting with voters. We're making calls, knocking on doors, sending direct mail, and making sure our message is heard in every corner of the state. We have one of the most sophisticated coordinated effort Wisconsin has ever seen -- helping not just my campaign, but campaigns of Democrats up and down the ballot. **And your support has made this possible.** At midnight on Wednesday (_in just two days!_), we're closing the books on the final reporting period of this campaign. When this report goes live, Senator Johnson's campaign and the fourteen right-wing groups that have supported him -- including the Koch network -- will be able to see just how strong our grassroots team is. What's going to shock them the most isn't going to be the amount we raised. It will be the number of grassroots contributions -- in increments of $5, $10, $25 -- adding up from folks across Wisconsin and the country. [**You can help make sure Wedn esday's filing is the strongest show of grassroots support Senator Johnson and his right-wing backers have ever seen: Contribute just $5 today.**](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf460c/1c469400/442c29/3540767/1974950469/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-cob?utm_source=ema_2016-10-17_RDF1_ND&refcode=ema_2016-10-17_RDF1_ND&utm_campaign=COB&utm_medium=ema") [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf460c/1c469400/442c29/3540767/1974950469/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-cob?utm_source=ema_2016-10-17_RDF1_ND&refcode=ema_2016-10-17_RDF1_ND&utm_campaign=COB&utm_medium=ema") [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf460c/1c469400/442c29/3540767/1974950469/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-cob?utm_source=ema_2016-10-17_RDF1_ND&refcode=ema_2016-10-17_RDF1_ND&utm_campaign=COB&utm_medium=ema") _Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf460c/1c469400/442c29/3540764/1974950469/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-cob?utm_source=ema_2016-10-17_RDF1_ND&refcode=ema_2016-10-17_RDF1_ND&utm_campaign=COB&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=5")

name: Corry Bliss
subject: Newspapers Agree
body:
| Peter \--

This weekend, Rob gained key endorsements from the _Cleveland Plain Dealer_ , the _Akron Beacon Journal_ , and the _Youngstown Vindicator_ \-- after already being endorsed by the _Cincinnati Enquirer_ , the _Columbus Dispatch_ , _Crain's Cleveland Business_ , and _The Courier_! Just this morning, Rob was also endorsed by _Martins Ferry Times Leader_ and the _Highland County Press_.

Newspapers agree, Rob is the "superior candidate" and the only candidate with the "energy and ideas necessary to represent Ohio's interests." [Watch our new web video](https://www.robportman.com/watch_newspapers_agree?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newspapersblast&n=1) highlighting the recent newspaper endorsements.

[](https://www.robportman.com/watch_newspapers_agree?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newspapersblast&n=2)
Meanwhile, newspapers state that Ted Strickland seems "stale and disengaged," noting his failure to "offer his own clear road maps," and saying "it's hard to believe Strickland could make a difference in the Senate." The _Cleveland Plain Dealer_ , the _Columbus Dispatch_ , the _Akron Beacon Journal_ and the _Youngstown Vindicator_ endorsed Ted in previous races for governor, but they each support Rob for re-election.

You may [click here](https://www.robportman.com/watch_newspapers_agree?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newspapersblast&n=3) to watch "Newspapers Agree."

There is a clear choice in this election between moving forward with Rob's pro-growth policies for better wages and more jobs, or returning to Ted Strickland's failed policies of higher taxes, more regulations, and bigger government.

This is the most important email I will send.

As it stands, Nancy Pelosi is in prime position to do serious
damage to our historic House majority on Election Day.

She already has millions of dollars in attack ads against our
conservative candidates.

That spending doesn't reflect the extra help they'll get from the
liberal media -- don't get me started on that...

name: Mike Weinholtz
subject: Mike Weinholtz for Governor Newsletter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Weinholtz for Governor
body:
| | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/-6458071695243408640/-5113325011204896000)
---
**_MIKE WEINHOLTZ FOR GOVERNOR NEWSLETTER_** _Haz click_[ _aqu i _](https://act.myngp.com/el/-6458071695243408640/-5041267417166968064)_para leerlo en espa ñol!_ **_MESSAGE FROM MIKE_** This year's presidential election has put sexism and the mistreatment of women centerstage. To help speak out against it, my campaign held a Rally for Fair Treatment of Women at the Capitol building! I was proud to stand with Charlene Albarran (candidate for Congress), and Catherine Kanter (candidate for Salt Lake County Council) and dozens of others to call for fair, equal treatment of women in Utah. **[Check out the video:](https://act.myngp.com/el/-6458071695243408640/-4969209823129040128)** [](https://act.myngp.com/el/-6458071695243408640/-4969209823129040128) It's hard to believe that Utah's own elected officials like Gov. Herbert could endorse Donald Trump for so long despite all the terrible things he's said and done to women. It's even harder to believe how quick supporters were to pat them on the head for "doing the right thing" and changing their mind. Wouldn't the right thing been to have rejected him from the beginning? Were the verbal insults to women, mocking the disabled, outright racism, and constant lies not offensive enough? To be clear, this is all bigger than Trump: sexism and the mistreatment of women are real, rampant, and wrong. Unfortunately, our current governor has failed to address (or even acknowledge) the problems, and the women of Utah have been left to bear the consequences. As governor, I'll fight for simple, practical solutions in Utah, like mandatory rape kit testing, an audit of the Executive Branch to eliminate gender pay gap, encouraging female entrepreneurship via the Office of Economic Development, and much more! Our families, our communities, and our economy do better when women are treated fairly and equally. **[Stand with me this November and help demand fair treatment of women in Utah!](https://act.myngp.com/el/-6458071695243408640/-4897152229091112192)** Mike
* * *
**_LAST CALL FOR VOLUNTEERS!_** With just 3 weeks left until Election Day, my team has moved into our final, "Get Out the Vote" phase. In case you didn't already know, my campaign has built the single largest Field Team (meaning the team that makes phone calls, knocks doors, and coordinates volunteers to do the same) that Utah has ever seen! We're talking to literally thousands of voters every single day-- and we need your help! [](https://act.myngp.com/el/-6458071695243408640/-4825094635053184256) [**Sign up now to volunteer-- help us GET OUT THE VOTE!**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-6458071695243408640/-4825094635053184256)
* * *
**_PROTECTING UTAH 'S PUBLIC LANDS_** In both of our debates this year Gov. Herbert has insisted that he never said he'd sell off our public lands in Utah. This probably won't surprise you, but that's patently false. **[Check out this video to hear him say it himself:](https://act.myngp.com/el/-6458071695243408640/-4680979446977328384)** [](https://act.myngp.com/el/-6458071695243408640/-4608921852939400448) Not only did he SAY IT OUT LOUD, we all know that actions speak louder than words. Gov. "Available Jones" signed a bill that DEPENDS on selling public lands. He's also playing Utah voters for stupid, trying to hide his intentions behind a single word. Lands that are "leased" by the state of Utah for oil and gas extraction still technically belong to the state, but they're no longer public access. On top of that, many of them are destroyed by aggressive oil and gas extraction with no serious accountability or basic oversight by the state.
* * *
**_RISE AND SHOUT: BYU COLLEGE DEMOCRATS!_** Did you know that the BYU College Democrats are the largest group of their kind in the state and one of the biggest clubs at BYU, with hundreds of active student members each year? I got to spend an evening with a full house of these passionate, brilliant students (and staunch Democrats) at the beautiful, historic Provo Library. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/-6458071695243408640/-4825094635053184256) I'm proud to say that we have a shared campaign office and volunteer center in Provo! [**Sign up now for a volunteer event in Provo-- help get out the vote in Utah county!**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-6458071695243408640/-4825094635053184256)
* * *
**_YOUTH HOMELESSNESS IN UTAH_** This past week I was privileged to join the Stonewall Democratic Caucus and Volunteers of America to help prepare and serve breakfast to homeless youth: It's estimated that every year several thousand Utah youth experience homelessness. Over 50% of them identify as LGBTQ, and Utah has the 5th highest teen suicide rate. That's not something anyone, Republican or Democrat, can be proud of-- or ignore. It was an honor to serve alongside some of the dedicated volunteers helping address youth homelessness, and as governor I'll continue to fight for greater awareness, resources, and smart programs that empower volunteers like these!
* * *
**_My campaign isn 't taking any corporate money, which means that the only way we can win is through support from individuals like you!_** **_Click_**[** _here_**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-6458071695243408640/-4536864258901472512)** _to contribute now!_**
---

Paid for by Mike Weinholtz for Governor
---

Mike for Utah
193 W. 2100 S.
South Salt Lake UT 84115 United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/-6458071695243408640/-5185382605242823936).

subject: BREAKING: Hillary Clinton Gives a Half Million to Chris Koster
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greitens for Missouri, Jeff Stuerman, Treasurer
body:
You've got to see this breaking news.
Today, Hillary Clinton [announced](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=4935ad86df&e=84041254e6) that she will be donating $500,000 to help prop up crooked career politician Chris Koster's [tanking](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=bc63ce637b&e=84041254e6) campaign for governor.
It's a match made in heaven. Koster endorsed Hillary early on and serves as a key advisor on Hillary's ["leadership council"](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=4f90ccb425&e=84041254e6) in Missouri. Hillary has previously praised Koster and [endorsed him](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=1089104028&e=84041254e6) in the race for governor.
[](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=819a42b727&e=84041254e6)
But their connections go further then that. Both candidates have been political fixtures for decades, although Chris Koster has been running for office longer than Hillary has. Both were the subjects of [national investigations](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=b06714db24&e=84041254e6) into pay-to-play corruption. Chris Koster even retained counsel in response to reports that he was the subject of an [FBI investigation](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=ea65e6b3fe&e=84041254e6) into corruption, just like Hillary Clinton.
Hillary Clinton and Chris Koster are also in lock step on the issues. Hillary Clinton and Chris Koster support [expanding Obamacare](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=791432f537&e=84041254e6), in fact Chris Koster has called Obamacare expansion his [top priority](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=47c4bcc9f6&e=84041254e6). Koster and Clinton also support [Obama's executive amnesty](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=3eac9052dc&e=84041254e6) and Chris Koster plans to [raise taxes](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage2.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=eeef3b2b79&e=84041254e6) on Missouri families, just like Hillary Clinton.
Crooked career politicians stick together. Hillary Clinton proved that today, by spending half a million dollars to prop up her political twin in Missouri.

But that's why we have you! [Fight back](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=c0b05941b2&e=84041254e6) against the Clinton-Koster machine and [invest](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=8b0957a1c0&e=84041254e6) in real leadership today. We need [investments](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=5e80fe68e9&e=84041254e6) from hard-working patriots like yourself to make sure that [Hillary Clinton doesn't get her pick](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=8d18133eaf&e=84041254e6) in this race.
**[Don't Let Hillary Pick Our Governor](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=2bed4bcb44&e=84041254e6) \- [Fight Back](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=a1437f49fb&e=84041254e6)**

St. Louis, Missouri 63108

Grassroots for Steve ****

| **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
October 17, 2016

**Media Contact: Ethan Latour**
_ethan@philscott.org_
_802-595-3776_

**Vermont Police Association Endorse Phil Scott for Governor**
_Cite Phil’s Leadership on Law Enforcement Issues and Commitment to Public Safety_
Montpelier, Vt.—Today, the Vermont Police Association issued the following endorsement of Phil Scott for Governor:

"The Vermont Police Association is pleased to endorse Lieutenant Governor Phil Scott for office of Governor of the State of Vermont. During Mr. Scott's years of public service as Senator and Lt. Governor, he has demonstrated a true commitment to public safety legislation serving Vermont's best interest. Lt. Governor Scott fully understands the challenges posed by the array of public safety issues Vermont must address. The Vermont Police Association believes that Mr. Scott can be relied upon to address those issues.

"The Vermont Police Association also values Lt. Governor Scott's longstanding support of Vermont's law enforcement and public safety community. Lt. Governor Scott understands the day to day challenges and demands of our jobs, the importance of maintaining high professional standards and the need to maintain positive relationships with our communities. We trust that Lt. Governor Scott will strike the right balance to the extent those interests ever compete and that he will do so in service of the best interests of Vermont.

"Finally, our endorsement is also grounded in Lt. Governor Scott's admirable track record of considerate leadership. Lt. Governor Scott is a thoughtful and inquisitive public servant genuinely interested in understanding varying perspectives of an issue before taking a position. Lt. Governor Scott recognizes that strong leadership begins with a willingness to listen with an open mind and the temperament that make others feel invited and welcome to the table. For this reason, the Vermont Police Association believes Lt. Governor Scott will always give full and fair consideration of law enforcement's concerns as he undertakes to decide what he believes is the right thing to do for Vermont.

"Vermont is facing some significant challenges such as the opiate crisis, domestic violence, gun control, immigration issues, mental health and fair and impartial policing. We endorse Lt. Governor Scott because we believe he has the qualities to best represent Vermont and work collaboratively with Vermont's law enforcement community, community leaders, lawmakers and our fellow citizens in addressing those issues."

George P. Merkel
President of the Vermont Police Association
###

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Bill Nye the Democracy Guy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
Thanks, Bill, for your confidence in me and our progressive and innovative state. [](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=OTcwNzI1OQS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTAyMTM1ODUwMwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
| Friend, Victoria, a middle schooler from Washington state, asked Bill Nye what she can do to change the world. I want to share part of his answer: | | [](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=OTcwNzI1OQS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTAyMTM1ODUwMwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
_
"**Voting is the most important thing for us, especially this year.** Take the environment into account...Your governor, Jay Inslee, is an acquaintance of mine and he's a big environmentalist; he wrote a book Apollo's Fire, it's about the future and what people are doing to take care of the environment."_

\-- Bill Nye
I'm proud of Victoria and all the young Washingtonians who are the key to our future -- I'm proud of her passion, and I'm proud of her eagerness to be a big part of the movement to combat climate change.
Bill Nye's right -- so much is at stake on the ballot this year, not the least of which is whether we continue to take bold action to fight climate change or whether we go backward and shirk our responsibility to protect our environment for generations to come.
To Bill, I want to say thanks -- thanks for your confidence in me and our progressive and innovative state.
Now, I'm not going to stop fighting -- not for a second -- to continue making Washington state a leader in the fight against climate change. We have a moral responsibility to do it and it's our best shot to make Washington a clean energy leader and create thousands of well-paying jobs.
I'm proud of Bill's confidence. And I'm darn proud to have you on my team. With so much at stake and with ballots about to drop, [**will you chip in $5 today to let me know you care about the work we 're doing in Washington?**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=OTcwNzI1OQS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTAyMTM1ODUwMwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks for being part of this fight.
Very truly yours,
Jay Inslee

\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Russ Feingold
Date: Mon, Oct 17, 2015
Subject: My update for you
[](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4609/1c469400/437358/354010a/3046816354/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-cob?utm_source=ema_2016-10-17_RDF1_ND-fwd&refcode=ema_2016-10-17_RDF1_ND-fwd&utm_campaign=COB&utm_medium=ema")
Tom,
October has been a big month for Team Russ: We've hosted roundtables and rallies to listen to seniors' concerns about cuts to Social Security and Medicare. I've heard from students, who say their biggest concern after graduating is being crushed by student loan debt.
My friends Senators Bernie Sanders, Elizabeth Warren, and Al Franken joined me on the campaign trail to speak with voters about why we're working so hard: To make sure the voices of middle-class and working families are represented in the Senate, and to fight for our shared progressive values.
We've seen polls that have us up, polls that have us within the margin of error, and even polls that show us down. **But no matter what the polls say, we haven't lost focus.**
While I've been on the road meeting with folks across the state, our campaign team has been working around the clock. We're up on the air with TV ads. We're in the field meeting with voters. We're making calls, knocking on doors, sending direct mail, and making sure our message is heard in every corner of the state.
We have one of the most sophisticated coordinated effort Wisconsin has ever seen -- helping not just my campaign, but campaigns of Democrats up and down the ballot. **And your support has made this possible.**
At midnight on Wednesday (_in just two days!_), we're closing the books on the final reporting period of this campaign. When this report goes live, Senator Johnson's campaign and the fourteen right-wing groups that have supported him -- including the Koch network -- will be able to see just how strong our grassroots team is.
What's going to shock them the most isn't going to be the amount we raised. It will be the number of grassroots contributions -- in increments of $5, $10, $25 -- adding up from folks across Wisconsin and the country.
[**You can help make sure Wedn esday's filing is the strongest show of grassroots support Senator Johnson and his right-wing backers have ever seen: Contribute just $5 today.**](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4609/1c469400/437358/354010a/3046816354/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-cob?utm_source=ema_2016-10-17_RDF1_ND-fwd&refcode=ema_2016-10-17_RDF1_ND-fwd&utm_campaign=COB&utm_medium=ema")
